response: Yes, both Stephen R. Donaldson and Michael Moorcock are science fiction writers. Stephen R. Donaldson is an American fantasy, science fiction, and mystery novelist known for his "Chronicles of Thomas Covenant" series, while Michael Moorcock is an English writer primarily of science fiction and fantasy, best recognized for his novels about the character Elric of Melniboné. Both have made significant contributions to the science fiction and fantasy genres.
